channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Jai Lucas announced as Miami's new coach. He'll take over for Jim Larrañaga with the Hurricanes
item.description: Jai Lucas says Miami has everything needed to compete at the top of the college basketball world. And the Hurricanes have given him the chance to prove it.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: At the bobsled and skeleton world championships, some moms might make their way to the podium
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — The latest addition to the list of amenities available to athletes at the bobsled and skeleton world championships is a room inside a lodge just down the hill from the finish line.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: One-of-a-kind card featuring jersey patch of Pirates star Paul Skenes is heading to auction
item.description: PITTBURGH (AP) — Paul Skenes has been in the major leagues for less than a year. A piece of the Pittsburgh Pirates ace — well, OK, a piece of the jersey that Skenes donned during his first start last May — could be ready to join some elite company.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ex-NFL star reveals how he'd beat drug tests during playing days
item.description: Former NFL star Adam "Pacman" Jones told Deion Sanders on his Tubi show that he never used his own urine for drug tests when he played in the league.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Jazz lose to Pelicans in battle for last place, 128-121
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The victories just aren't that important right now for the Utah Jazz. Getting their younger players game experience in the priority, and plenty of young guys saw the floor Sunday in a 128-121 loss to New Orleans Sunday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Donato scores twice, Blackhawks snap 5-game skid with 6-3 road win over Ducks
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) — Ryan Donato had two goals and an assist, and the Blackhawks ended a five-game losing streak with a 6-3 road victory over the Anaheim Ducks on Saturday night. Teuvo Teravainen had a goal and two assists and Lukas Reichel, Wyatt Kaiser and Patrick Marron also scored.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego FC makes its home debut before a sellout crowd in a city hungry for top-level soccer
item.description: A match decades in the making finally happens Saturday night when San Diego FC debuts on its home field in front of a sellout crowd of fans starved for elite professional sports — and particularly hungry for top-level soccer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: John Collins leads Jazz to 117-116 win over Minnesota
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Walker Kessler had a go-ahead dunk with 9.7 seconds left to help the Utah Jazz beat the Minnesota Timberwolves 117-116 on Friday night, snapping a six-game losing streak in the series.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Baseball explodes at the plate for dominant double-header sweep
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — On an absolutely picturesque day for baseball at The Diamond at the Bus Bergman Sports Complex, CMU trailed MSU Billings 2-0 early. A 2-run shot to right by MSU's River Smith in the top of the 2nd put the Mavs in a hole.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Lone Peak wins fourth straight state championship
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The dynasty continues for the Lone Peak girls basketball team. The Knights won their fourth straight state championship Thursday beating Copper Hills for a second straight year, 46-42.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
